allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\(''./node_modules/ai/package.json''\); console.log\(''ai version:'', pkg.version\); const pkg2 = require\(''./node_modules/@ai-sdk/anthropic/package.json''\); console.log\(''@ai-sdk/anthropic version:'', pkg2.version\);")
Bash(node -e "const { anthropic } = require\(''@ai-sdk/anthropic''\); console.log\(''anthropic provider loaded:'', typeof anthropic\);")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\({ path: ''.env.local'' }\); var k = process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY || ''''; console.log\(''key length:'', k.length\); console.log\(''key start:'', k.substring\(0, 15\)\);")

Bash(node -e "var dotenv = require\(''dotenv''\); var r = dotenv.config\({ path: ''.env.local'' }\); console.log\(''error:'', r.error\); console.log\(''parsed keys:'', Object.keys\(r.parsed || {}\)\);")

Bash(node -e "var dotenv = require\(''dotenv''\); var r = dotenv.config\({ path: ''.env.local'' }\); var k = r.parsed[''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'']; console.log\(''parsed key length:'', k.length\); console.log\(''parsed key start:'', k.substring\(0, 15\)\);")

Bash(node -e "console.log\(''before dotenv:'', JSON.stringify\(process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\)\); require\(''dotenv''\).config\({ path: ''.env.local'', override: true }\); console.log\(''after dotenv:'', \(process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY || ''''\).substring\(0, 15\)\);")
Bash(node -e "console.log\(''env type:'', typeof process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\); console.log\(''env value repr:'', JSON.stringify\(process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\({ path: ''.env.local'', override: true }\); var k = process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY || ''''; console.log\(''key length:'', k.length\); console.log\(''key prefix:'', k.substring\(0, 15\)\);")
Bash(git add .gitignore components.json eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts package.json package-lock.json postcss.config.mjs tailwind.config.ts tsconfig.json prisma/ src/)
